title: Login success with valid credentials and role-based access
description: Verify that a user can log in with valid credentials and is granted access appropriate to their assigned role.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Enter valid username and password
Click the login button
Confirm login is successful and the user is directed to the main dashboard
Verify the features and permissions available match the user's role

title: Login failure with invalid credentials
description: Ensure the system denies access and shows an error message when a user attempts to login with invalid credentials.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Enter invalid username or password
Click the login button
Confirm login is unsuccessful and an appropriate error message is displayed

title: Main dashboard displays accurate lab performance metrics and alerts
description: Validate that the dashboard shows up-to-date and accurate statistics about lab performance, including order alerts (e.g., Late, Rejected) and workload summaries.

steps.description: Log in with valid credentials
Verify that lab performance metrics are displayed on the dashboard
Verify that order alerts (Late, Rejected, etc.) are visible and accurate based on actual order data
Verify workload summary for laboratory staff is shown correctly

title: Create a new dental lab order successfully
description: Test that a user can create a new dental lab order with valid input data and the order is saved correctly.

steps.description: Log in and navigate to the order management page
Open the new order creation form
Fill in valid order details including patient info, procedure, and assigned staff
Submit the order form
Verify the order is created and saved to the system
Check the new order appears in the order list with correct details

title: Update an existing dental lab order
description: Ensure users can update details of an existing order and that changes persist correctly.

steps.description: Log in and open the order management section
Select an existing order from the list
Edit one or more fields in the order form
Submit the updated order
Verify the order details are updated in the system
Confirm the changes are reflected in the order list and any related reports

title: Filter orders by status and user role
description: Confirm the order management module allows users to filter orders based on status (e.g., Pending, Completed) and their user role, returning correct filtered results.

steps.description: Log in as a user with a specific role
Navigate to order management
Apply a filter to view orders by a specific status
Verify only orders matching the selected status are shown
Apply a filter that restricts orders visibility based on user role
Confirm the orders displayed respect the user's role permissions

title: Add a new doctor profile successfully
description: Test creation of a new doctor profile with valid data and verify it persists correctly in the system.

steps.description: Log in and navigate to doctor management
Open the doctor profile creation form
Input valid doctor details including name, contact info and preferences
Submit the new doctor profile form
Ensure the new doctor profile is saved and visible in the doctor list

title: Edit an existing doctor profile and persist changes
description: Verify users can update an existing doctor’s profile and preferences and that the updates are reflected properly.

steps.description: Log in and access doctor management
Select an existing doctor profile
Modify doctor details and preferences
Save the changes
Verify updates are persisted and displayed correctly in the system

title: Record a financial transaction and verify accuracy
description: Ensure that financial transactions can be recorded accurately and the data is correct upon retrieval.

steps.description: Log in with appropriate permissions and navigate to the financials module
Add a new financial transaction with valid details
Submit the transaction
Verify the transaction appears correctly in transaction records with accurate details

title: Manage expenses and confirm correct data persistence
description: Validate users can add and update expenses in the financial module and that changes are maintained.

steps.description: Access the financial management section after login
Create a new expense entry with required details
Save the expense data
Ensure the expense is listed with correct details in the expenses overview
Edit an existing expense record
Save the updated expense data
Verify the system reflects the updated expense information

title: Generate and validate invoice details
description: Test the invoice generation feature to ensure invoices are created properly with accurate transaction and billing data.

steps.description: Navigate to financials and locate the invoice generation section
Generate an invoice for selected transactions or orders
Verify the invoice contains correct client information, itemized charges, totals, and dates
Check the invoice can be saved and retrieved intact

title: Add a new system user with role assignment
description: Ensure that an admin can create a new user and assign the appropriate role which dictates their permissions in the system.

steps.description: Log in as admin and navigate to user management
Open new user creation form
Fill in user details and assign a role
Submit to create the new user
Verify the new user appears in the user list with the assigned role

title: Modify existing user roles and verify access changes
description: Verify that when an admin changes a user's role, the system updates the user's permissions and enforces the new role appropriately.

steps.description: Log in as admin and access the user management page
Select an existing user
Change the user's role and save changes
Confirm changes are saved and displayed correctly
Log in as the updated user
Verify the user’s access and functionality align with the new role

title: Remove a system user and ensure access revocation
description: Test that admins can delete a system user and that the deleted user can no longer log in or access the system.

steps.description: Log in as admin and navigate to the user management interface
Delete an existing user
Confirm the user is removed from the user list
Attempt to log in with the deleted user's credentials
Verify login is denied and appropriate error message is displayed

title: Access restriction enforcement for unauthorized features
description: Ensure that users cannot access features or data outside their role permissions regardless of URL manipulation or direct navigation attempts.

steps.description: Log in as a user with limited permissions
Attempt to access restricted modules or pages directly via URL
Verify access is denied and user is redirected appropriately with an error or no access message

title: Dashboard displays correct data after backend data changes
description: Test that after updating order or financial data in backend, the dashboard refreshes and displays the updated data accurately.

steps.description: Log in and view dashboard
Update some order statuses or financial records via backend or another interface
Refresh or revisit the dashboard
Verify that the dashboard metrics, alerts, and summaries reflect the updated backend data

title: Handle missing or incomplete input gracefully in order creation
description: Verify that the order creation form validates input fields and shows appropriate error messages for missing or invalid data.

steps.description: Navigate to order creation form
Leave required fields empty or enter invalid data
Submit the order form
Verify that validation errors are shown and the form is not submitted

title: System maintains role-based access after user session expiration and re-login
description: Verify that when a user's session expires, upon re-login the system enforces the user’s role permissions correctly.

steps.description: Log in as a user with role-based restrictions
Expire the user's session manually or wait
Log in again with the same user credentials
Verify that the user sees features and data appropriate to their role after re-login
